Target Patient Population: Adults with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC) in the first-line setting
Key Efficacy Claim: Lenvima + Keytruda Combination Efficacy: 71% Objective Response Rate (ORR) (CLEAR trial)
Key Safety Parameter: Lenvima + Keytruda Safety Profile: 82% Grade 3/4 Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events
Core Marketing Hook: Conquer advanced renal cell carcinoma with the power of combination therapy.
